name: Golden House Ltd
summary: Golden House Ltd provides assisted independent living services for elderly population in Israel. It operates The Golden Age House TA, an assisted independent living house that contains 300 housing units, as well as public spaces, including a lobby, club, restaurant, coffee shop, library, movie theatre, synagogue, classroom, lecture room, fitness center, spa, and green garden terrace. The company also offers nursing care services. Golden House Ltd was founded in 1982 and is based in Tel-Aviv, Israel.
